//: Lighthouse CI budget (2026-06-07, upgrade plan #9). Turns the perf.yml Lighthouse run from informational into a regression gate. ERROR floors are conservative (a strong, already-audited site clears them) so they fail only on a real regression, not flap; the volatile metrics (performance score, LCP, TBT) are WARN so they surface trends without red-flagging on mobile-emulation noise. Tighten the floors once a few green runs establish the true baseline.
